name: sdd-implementation
description: [internal] Implement approved SDD tasks (one at a time or in batch) and prepare them for independent quality review. Use /sdd-ship:run for the standard workflow.

interface.longDescription: Restores task state, implements approved tasks one at a time or in batch (dependency-aware), runs scoped tests, auto-transitions to quality-gate on batch completion, and produces implementation handoff reports.
capabilities: Batch task implementation in dependency order (implement-tasks)
Task state restoration and dependency-aware scheduling
Auto quality-gate transition when all tasks reach Implementation Complete
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the implement-tasks skill for specs/<feature>/tasks.md to implement all approved tasks in order.
